_meta.author: Your Name
_meta.description: Example disposition file for custom merchants. Place in Data/SKSE/Plugins/DynamicBartering/Dispositions/ and it will be loaded additively at startup.
_meta.notes: Entries here will override the default disposition if the merchant name matches. Names must match the NPC's base name exactly (case-insensitive matching is applied).

My Custom Merchant.note: A custom merchant added by my mod.

Friendly Trader.note: Override example: this overrides any default entry.
